instructions.summary: Can you add a bot to the Worktugal Telegram group? If yes, I can automate posting. If no, post manually — message is ready.
instructions.detail: Worktugal is on Telegram, not Slack. Telegram Bot API makes autonomous posting trivial — one curl call. But the bot needs to be a member of the group. This only works if you are an admin or can add members.
instructions.exact_action:
If you can add the bot to the group:
1. Open Telegram and message @BotFather
2. Send /newbot, follow the prompts (name it 'VerdeDesk', username e.g. verdedesk_bot)
3. BotFather sends you a token like: 7123456789:AAF...
4. Add that bot to the Worktugal Telegram group
5. Send the bot token to this chat — I will wire it in and handle posting automatically

If you cannot add bots to the group:
Just paste this message directly into the Worktugal Telegram group:

'Hey folks - I have been quietly building something for the recibo verde pain and wanted to share it here first since this community has been so helpful. It is called VerdeDesk (verdedesk.vercel.app) - an English-friendly interface for the Portuguese green receipt workflow. Tracks income, warns before the 15k VAT threshold, SS declaration reminders. All in plain English. Not launched yet - just gauging interest. If you pay an accountant just for receipt issuance or have had friction with Portal das Financas, I would love to hear about it. Waitlist is open if you want early access.'
instructions.unblocks: Worktugal community outreach — highest-quality leads for VerdeDesk
